series_metadata.series_description: Includes completed DAS property inventory annual certificates, completed DAS annual/biennial inventory certificates, physical inventory worksheets and corresponding support documentation, annual physical inventory report, annual and monthly disposal/addition reports and corresponding support documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 fiscal years then destroy provided audited and the audit report is released. ; Electronic: Retain 2 fiscal years then destroy provided audited and the audit report is released., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
